clips.title: The Toy Room
clips.prompt: 3D animated feature film style, rounded appealing character design, soft global illumination, polished CG, warm colors. Present day. A cozy bedroom crammed with colorful toys, shelves of stuffed animals, a big round rug. Afternoon, warm. A person in a striped sweater kneels in the doorway peering in with wonder, hand on the frame. Building blocks, a toy train, a glowing night-light. Soft warm bounce light, cheerful palette. Slow dolly in. Charming 3D feature aesthetic, 24fps.
